docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, ELLEN REBECCA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, IN LIEU OF JUDGMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER THAN JANUARY 6, 2012, RETURN 3 DRAWINGS WHICH WERE MADE BY THE PLAINTIFF AND WHICH ARE IN THE DEFENDANT'S POSSESSION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ELLEN REBECCA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY (ROMANOV), EOWYN AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ELLEN REBECCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED: "UNCLAIMED") COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ELLEN REBECCA
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-28-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ELLEN REBECCA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPREARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-14-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ELLEN REBECCA
